habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Puede aguantar la respiración durante varios minutos antes de ahogarse.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Hold Breath (Ex) The dolphin can hold its breath for 6 times its Constitution score in minutes before it risks drowning.

fullStatBlock:
CR 1/2
Dolphin
N Medium animal
Init +2
Senses blindsight 120 ft., low-light vision; Perception +9
AC 13, touch 12, flat-footed 11 (+2 Dex, +1 natural)
hp 11 (2d8+2)
Fort +4, Ref +5, Will +1
Speed swim 80 ft.
Melee slam +3 (1d4+1)
Space 5 ft.; Reach 5 ft.
Special Abilities Hold Breath (Ex) The dolphin can hold its breath for 6 times its Constitution score in minutes before drowning risk begins.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 12, Dex 15, Con 13, Int 2, Wis 13, Cha 6
Base Atk +1; CMB +2; CMD 14
Feats Weapon Finesse
Skills Perception +9, Swim +13
Racial Modifiers +4 Perception
Environment any ocean
Organization solitary, pair, or pod (3-18)
Treasure none
Source PFRPG Bestiary
